_documentation.job_resolution: When jobs[].module is omitted, Heimdallr resolves jobs[].name to heimdallr.metrics.jobs.<name>.
_documentation.job_addition: To add a new job, create the module under heimdallr/metrics/jobs/ and declare it in jobs[]. Use jobs[].module only for non-conventional names inside heimdallr.metrics.jobs.
_documentation.parallel_execution: Profiles may set execution.max_parallel_jobs. Jobs may declare needs to wait for prerequisite job names while still allowing independent jobs to run in parallel.
_documentation.experimental_jobs: Experimental metrics modules should live under heimdallr.metrics.jobs.tests or heimdallr.metrics.analysis and be enabled only via explicit jobs[].module overrides in host-local config.
